$schema: Getamazednow AI Design System – Design Tokens v1.0

brand.name: Getamazednow AI
brand.mark: Tensor Node Lattice — an isometric 3D cube built from 8 interconnected dot nodes (7 cube vertices + 1 brighter core hub), in a circular Ink badge lockup

ink.usage: primary dark background, badge fill, header/footer, dark-mode surface
ink.note: Shared with Getamazednow Photography — parent-brand DNA color

signal.usage: primary accent, decorative, node/edge color on Ink surfaces, large text/icons (4.71:1 AA on Ink)

signalDeep.usage: accessible signal-family text/icons on light surfaces (4.57:1 AA)

signalCore.usage: core-node highlight, hover glow, gradient end-stop — decorative only

stone.usage: secondary accent, byline text ('A Getamazednow Company'), muted labels, borders
stone.note: Shared with Getamazednow Photography — parent-brand DNA color

neutral.note: Identical ramp to Getamazednow Photography — shared neutral infrastructure off the Ink hue

semantic.note: Identical to Getamazednow Photography — one accessibility bar across both brands

contrastNotes.stoneOnWhite: 2.61:1 (FAIL – decorative/large only, never body text, shared with Photography)

logotypeFonts.note: No proprietary logotype font — the wordmark is set directly in Poppins ExtraBold. Unlike the Photography mark, there is no logo-only font dependency and no dark-background restriction.

display.usage: H1–H2, slide titles, hero headings, wordmark lockup

recommendedSystemFonts.note: Identical pairing to Getamazednow Photography — shared typographic DNA across both brands

logo.clearSpace: 1x the diameter of the badge circle on all sides, minimum
logo.constructionNote: 8 nodes (7 cube vertices + 1 brighter core hub), 15 edges (9 cube edges + 6 core spokes). Node opacity/size graduates by depth: farthest node smallest/dimmest, core hub largest/brightest.
